title: Valentine To The Girl In Black
content:
In hand I take this pen of mine
    To write you, sweet, a valentine;
    I�d take your dainty hand instead,
    But�you�re a drawing - I am wed�
    And that is why, you understand,
    I only take my pen in hand.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Ellis Parker Butler, titled "Valentine To The Girl In Black", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
